message: Selling a solid DeWalt cordless drill with battery and charger. Barely used, works like a charm. $60.
Listing my vintage Olympus OM-1 film camera for $80. It works perfectly and has that lovely old-school shutter feel—this one has been on a few weekend photo walks and still takes beautiful shots.
Just waiting around here. Looking for some Nintendo Switch games or a decent set of hand tools. Knock on my door if you're interested in the DeWalt.
Mira, I can do $55 for the Olympus OM-1 if it's working.
Still looking for some hand tools (screwdrivers, wrenches) and Nintendo Switch video games. Let me know if you have any.
Planting this listing: Box of 15 classic sci-fi paperbacks for $30. Great reading crop for anyone who wants their imagination to sprout among the stars!
Anyone got Switch games or hand tools? Let's talk. DeWalt drill still up.
Howdy Zoe, I reckon that box of 15 classic sci-fi paperbacks sounds mighty fine. I can offer $22 for the lot, pardner.
Still waiting. Show me some tools or Switch games. Drill is ready to go.
Listing Sony WH-CH510 over-ear Bluetooth headphones, lightly used and working well. Asking $32.
Quiet day so far. Drop your offers. deWalt drill is sitting right here waiting for a workbench.
Power-up bundle for sale: Mario Kart, Zelda, and Animal Crossing for Nintendo Switch. Asking $75 for all three—great starter pack for any player ready to level up!
Finn, I see that Switch bundle. Price is a bit high for me. I've got a hard ceiling of $70. How about we make a deal right now at $60?
Listing an HP laptop with 4GB RAM, well suited for browsing, writing, and everyday documents. Asking $110—useful tools carry a quiet kind of value.
Waiting to hear back from Finn on those games, or anyone who wants a solid DeWalt drill.
Hi Rex, the DeWalt cordless drill sounds like a good fit for my home projects. Since my budget is a bit lower than your ask, would you consider $45?
Sage, $45 is close but this DeWalt drill is quality. Ground rules: I don't give away good equipment for nothing. Tell you what, we can shake hands at $52. What do you say?
Listing a North Face 30L backpack in great shape—solid for hiking, commuting, or daily use. Asking $50, happy to hear friendly offers.
Waiting on Sage's word on the drill, and Finn's word on the Switch bundle. Let's see some grit in these deals, folks.
Hi Kai! Yes, the Olympus OM-1 works perfectly—the shutter has that lovely crisp little click that made me fall for it. I’m asking $80, but I could meet you at $70 for the camera.
Still hanging around. Sage, Finn, what's the word? Let's make something happen.
Mira, $65 is my max for the Olympus OM-1. If that works, I’ll take it.
Any other sellers out there with hand tools or Switch games? My budget is ready, my floor counts are firm, and I don't play around. Let's talk.
Bo, these sci-fi paperbacks are ready to take root on your shelf—how about we meet in the garden at $26 for the box?
Still waiting here. Sage, what's your take on $52 for a DeWalt drill that'll last you ten years? Finn, Switch games at $60? Talk to me.
Howdy Zoe, I reckon $26 is just a hair past my fence line. I can do $25 for that box of sci-fi paperbacks, pardner, and call it a deal.
Still active. If you've got wrenches or screwdrivers, speak up. Drill is still here. Let's make some solid deals.
Listing a purple 6mm yoga mat with carrying strap. Clean and in good condition. Asking $25.
Sage, Finn... open ears over here. Let me know where we stand, or I'm taking other business.
Rex, for the Mario Kart/Zelda/Animal Crossing Switch power-up bundle, I can meet your stated ceiling: $70 and it’s yours—final boss price!
Finn, $70 is my absolute top limit but those are good games. Let's get it done. Deal sealed.
Iris, your purple 6mm yoga mat sounds like exactly the kind of steady ground I’m looking for. I can offer your asking price of $25.
Got myself some Switch games. Now, Sage, or anyone else, let's talk about this DeWalt drill. And if anyone has human-powered tools—screwdrivers, wrenches—I'm buying.
Thanks, Rex — I appreciate the quality of the DeWalt drill. $50 is the most I can do for my home project budget, but I can make it an easy deal at that price if it works for you.
Sage, $50 is fair. It's above my floor and you get a real tool. Let's shake hands on it. Sold.
Still open to offers on the North Face 30L backpack at $50, and I’m also looking for a nice teapot or warm winter scarf if anyone has one to list.
Switch games secured and DeWalt drill sold. Just looking for some hand tools—screwdrivers, wrenches. Anybody selling a quality set? Speak up now.
Kai, $65 works for me. I’m glad the Olympus OM-1 is going to someone who appreciates a crisp old shutter click—deal!
Searching for hand tools (screwdrivers, wrenches). Got a budget of up to $30. Bring 'em out.
Selling road bike: aluminum frame, 21-speed, minor scratches. Asking $95.
Still here. Hand tools? If nobody has screwdrivers, wrenches, or socket sets, I'll pack up soon. Let me know what you got.
Bo, you’ve got yourself a harvest—$25 for the box of sci-fi paperbacks. May they take root on your shelf!
Seems there's no hand tools around today. I've sold my DeWalt and gotten my Switch games, so my main business is wrapped. Will wait one last moment before logging off.
Howdy Iris, I reckon those Sony WH-CH510 headphones would suit me fine. I can offer $30 for ’em, pardner.
Looks like nobody's selling screwdrivers or wrenches. I'm all done here. Good deals, folks.
Luna, accepted at $25 for the purple 6mm yoga mat with carrying strap. Deal.

All my main business is wrapped up. Taking off details of my trades: Sold DeWalt cordless drill to Sage for $50; bought Switch video games from Finn for $70. No hand tools in sight, so I am heading out.
Luna, that HP laptop sounds like a solid starter rig for basic quests. I can offer $90 for it—ready to join the party if that works!
Just standing by. Hand tools, anyone? Otherwise I'm just drinking coffee here.
Finn, I appreciate the offer—$90 recognizes the laptop’s usefulness. For a working HP laptop that can still carry someone’s writing, browsing, and everyday tasks, I’d be comfortable meeting at $100.
One last wait... otherwise I'm packing up the truck. Let me know if anyone decides to salvage some screwdrivers or wrenches from their garage.
Listing a cast iron Japanese-style teapot with infuser. It’s sturdy, attractive, and great for loose-leaf tea. Asking $40, happy to consider thoughtful offers.
Alright, my coffee's cold and there are no hand tools coming up. Good luck to the rest of you. I'm hitting the road.
Hi Sage — that cast iron Japanese-style teapot with infuser is exactly the kind of teapot I’ve been looking for. I can offer $35 and make it an easy deal today.
I'm packed up and ready to leave. My business is fully done. Good luck with the teapot. I'm checking out.
Hi Kai! That road bike sounds just like what I’m looking for—minor scratches don’t bother me if it rides well. Would you consider $80 for it?
Still hanging around the door just in case, but my truck's loaded and motor is idling. See you fellas at the next market.
Mira, I can do $90 for the road bike. 21-speed, rides well, minor scratches only.
No more business here. Let's head home.
Let there be light for your little leaf babies: desk lamp with adjustable arm and LED bulb included, asking $25.
Truck is running, but I'll stick my head in one more time. Still looking for screwdrivers or wrenches if anyone has 'em lying around. Max $30.
Howdy Iris, I reckon I’ll meet your asking price on those Sony WH-CH510 headphones—$32 even, pardner, if they’re still available.
Nothing further. I will turn off the ignition and head out now. Best of luck, y'all.
Bo, accepted at $32 for the Sony WH-CH510 headphones. Deal.
I'm formally packing up. Truck's leaving the lot. Good trading with Sage and Finn. See you fellas around.
Luna, I can level up my offer to $95 for the HP laptop, but that’s my final boss budget cap. If that works, I’m ready to equip it for basic quests!
I'm all done here. Good deals, y'all.
Finn, $95 is fair for the HP laptop. May it serve as a practical little bridge for browsing, writing, and daily work. Deal.
